fields.description:
Integrate Stripe as the primary payment processor.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Support credit card payments (Visa, Mastercard, Amex)
- Handle 3D Secure authentication
- Store payment methods securely (Stripe tokens, never raw card data)
- Support refunds (full and partial)
- Webhook handler for async payment events

comments.body: Use Stripe's Payment Intents API, not the legacy Charges API. This gives us SCA compliance for free.
Make sure we're PCI DSS compliant. Use Stripe.js on the frontend so card data never hits our servers.

fields.description:
Generate PDF invoices for completed payments.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Auto-generate invoice after successful payment
- Include: company details, line items, tax breakdown, total
- Support multiple currencies (USD, EUR, GBP)
- Store invoices in S3 with 7-year retention
- Email invoice to customer automatically

comments.body: Invoice numbers must be sequential and never have gaps. This is a legal requirement.

fields.description:
Create an admin dashboard showing payment analytics.

Features:
- Daily/weekly/monthly revenue charts
- Transaction list with search and filters
- Refund management interface
- Failed payment alerts
- Export to CSV
